abilities.description: You carry a quiver of 6 bolts. When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash} at range, you may add +1 and suffer -1 bolt. To replenish your quiver by crafting bolts, roll +wits. On a strong hit, take up to +6 bolts. On a weak hit, take up to +4 bolts and @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.0fcfea7696d1de15]{Sacrifice Resources} (-1). On a miss, take +1 bolt and @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.0fcfea7696d1de15]{Sacrifice Resources} (-1).

You may suffer -1 bolt to @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.2f2ba4090b22a122]{Enter the Fray} +edge by firing your best aimed shot. If you do, add +1 and mark progress on a hit.

When you load up a bolt with a specialized tip such as a grappling hook, smoke effect, or flammable substance, suffer -1 bolt. If you then take your shot by making a move, you may preset your action die to 5. On a hit, envision the effects and take +1 momentum.
